headline: Applied Materials (AMAT) Is Up 9.0% After Launching 2nm GAA Deposition Tools For AI Chips
summary: Earlier this week, Applied Materials introduced two new chipmaking systems for 2-nanometer and Angstrom-era Gate-All-Around logic chips, using atomic-level control of metal and dielectric deposition to improve transistor performance and energy efficiency for advanced AI workloads. By enabling more precise shallow trench isolation and metal gate stack engineering at scale, these tools deepen Applied Materials’ role in solving some of the toughest manufacturing challenges behind the global AI...
